name: Volume (raw)
raw_definition: Trading volume used as confirmation for trend/correction and breakouts; candle color irrelevant.
notes: Use primarily for confirmation, not standalone signals.

name: Volume trend vs correction ratio
raw_definition: Volume tends to be higher in the direction of the trend and lower during corrections; use as confirmation.
source_hint: Derived from OHLCV + trend direction classifier

bands_or_thresholds.rule: Higher volume on trend legs than on pullbacks => trend quality higher

notes: Requires classifying weeks as impulse vs correction (from trend module).

name: Volume breakout confirmation (relative volume)
raw_definition: Breakouts tend to occur with high volume; low volume during consolidation/waiting phases.

bands_or_thresholds.rule: Breakout week volume >> recent average => confirm signal
Breakout on low volume => reduce confidence

notes: Use as confidence modifier for breakout/resumption events.

name: Moving Average (50-period; weekly)
raw_definition: Moving average smooths prices; used to identify trend; emphasized 50 and 200 in seminar.
notes: Lagging by nature; use with regime/trend module.

name: Moving Average (200-period; weekly)
raw_definition: Long moving average emphasized as an investment filter; below 200 MA considered avoid for funds (per seminar).

bands_or_thresholds.rule: Price below 200 MA => investment filter negative (risk-off bias)
Price above 200 MA => supportive backdrop

notes: Use as risk budget governor for equity exposure; do not overtrade.

name: MA cross (50 vs 200)
raw_definition: Relative position of 50 and 200 moving averages as trend filter (classic golden/death cross style).

bands_or_thresholds.rule: 50 MA above 200 MA => trend supportive
50 MA below 200 MA => trend weak

notes: Lagging; best as confirmation and risk budget bias, not timing.

name: MA contraction / low-volatility precursor
raw_definition: When the moving average (and price action) runs sideways/contracting, a new trend may form afterward (per seminar).
source_hint: Derived from MA slope + price range compression

bands_or_thresholds.rule: Sustained low slope + compressed range => potential setup (watch for breakout)

notes: Use as 'setup' context; combine with breakout + volume confirmation.

name: Slow Stochastic (14,3,3)
raw_definition: Slow stochastic oscillator (0–100) with standard thresholds: overbought >80, oversold <20; uses %K/%D smoothing (14,3,3 shown).

bands_or_thresholds.rule: >80 => overbought zone
<20 => oversold zone

notes: Use with regime: choppy favors mean reversion; trendy/momentum favors trend confirmation.

name: Slow Stochastic crossover signal
raw_definition: Signal from %K/%D crossovers (classic stochastic use).

bands_or_thresholds.rule: Bullish crossover out of oversold => supportive
Bearish crossover out of overbought => caution

notes: Treat as tactical; gate with MARKET_CONDITIONS (avoid in CHOPPY breakouts).

name: RSI (14)
raw_definition: Relative Strength Index oscillator (0–100): classical overbought >70, oversold <30.

bands_or_thresholds.rule: >70 => overbought zone
<30 => oversold zone

notes: Default RSI can be contrarian in choppy; but see Power Zone rule for trend/momentum.

name: RSI Power Zone (weekly momentum confirmation)
raw_definition: Power Zone concept: weekly RSI above ~70 acts as momentum confirmation (trend-following), not contrarian.

bands_or_thresholds.rule: Weekly RSI > 70 => strong momentum / trend confirmation

notes: Use to increase confidence in TRENDY/MOMENTUM regimes; do not treat as 'overbought means sell' in this context.

name: Three drivers framework (Liquidity / Sentiment / Fundamentals + Buybacks)
raw_definition: Top-level framework: 1) Liquidity flows, 2) Sentiment/positioning, 3) Fundamentals; optional 4) Buybacks.

bands_or_thresholds.rule: Liquidity risk-on & Sentiment risk-on & Fundamentals risk-on => high risk budget

notes: Use as module structure (not a market series).

name: Buybacks vs Earnings (relationship proxy)
raw_definition: Seminar states buybacks and earnings are tightly linked; chart referenced.
source_hint: Chart source not captured in text extraction
notes: Potential contradictions input: earnings weakening but buybacks high (or vice versa).

name: US Shareholder Payouts: Buybacks + Dividends (aggregate)
raw_definition: Chart referenced: buybacks and dividends; notable drop in Q2 2020.
source_hint: Chart source not captured in text extraction
notes: Used to gauge corporate distribution cycle; requires data source verification.

name: US Corporate Share Buybacks (aggregate volume)
raw_definition: Seminar highlights buybacks as an increasingly important driver; charts show strong rise since ~2012 and record year 2025.
source_hint: Chart source not captured in text; likely S&P Dow Jones Indices / Bloomberg / FactSet / Yardeni etc.

bands_or_thresholds.rule: Rising buybacks => demand tailwind; collapsing buybacks => risk-off signal

notes: Needs source selection + series definition; treat as module input not standalone timing tool.

name: S&P 500 Index (reference benchmark)
raw_definition: Referenced as equity proxy when discussing QE impact.
source_hint: Any provider (e.g., Yahoo/FRED/Quandl) — choose local source

bands_or_thresholds.rule: Trend up + drawdown low => supportive backdrop

notes: Used for context/overlay in charts; not a 'macro indicator' per se.

name: Federal Reserve Total Assets (WALCL)
raw_definition: Fed balance sheet total assets time series (WALCL).

bands_or_thresholds.rule: Strong expansion vs history => liquidity tailwind

notes: Resample to week-end as_of (Fri close).

name: University of Michigan Consumer Sentiment / Confidence
raw_definition: Monthly survey (~500 households) on personal finances + short/long-term economy outlook.
source_hint: University of Michigan Surveys of Consumers

bands_or_thresholds.rule: Extremes often contrarian per seminar

notes: Seminar notes extremes as contrarian; define quantitative extreme bands in playbook.

name: ISM Manufacturing subindex: Employment (20% weight in headline per seminar)
raw_definition: Subcomponent of ISM headline (employment).
notes: Bridge to labor market regime; confirm subindex availability in chosen data source.

name: ISM Manufacturing subindex: Inventories (10% weight per seminar)
raw_definition: Subcomponent of ISM headline (inventories).
notes: Use in contradictions with orders/production.

name: ISM Manufacturing PMI (headline)
raw_definition: ISM Manufacturing/PMI: survey of ~400 purchasing managers; key leading indicator.

bands_or_thresholds.rule: ISM > 50 => expanding activity (risk-on tailwind)
ISM < 50 => contraction risk; often precedes equity drawdowns

notes: Map to growth regime module; optionally smooth (3m avg).

name: ISM Manufacturing subindex: New Orders (30% weight in headline per seminar)
raw_definition: Subcomponent of ISM headline (orders).

bands_or_thresholds.rule: Sustained decline while headline stable => early warning

notes: Use for contradictions: headline ok but orders weak.

name: ISM Manufacturing subindex: Production (25% weight in headline per seminar)
raw_definition: Subcomponent of ISM headline (production).
notes: Useful for growth vs inflation interpretations.

name: ISM Manufacturing subindex: Supplier Deliveries (15% weight per seminar)
raw_definition: Subcomponent of ISM headline (supplier deliveries).
notes: Interpretation can flip (delays can mean demand strength or supply constraints); treat carefully.

name: CFTC Commitments of Traders (COT) net positioning (by asset)
raw_definition: Positioning proxy mentioned as sentiment via actual transactions (COT reports).

bands_or_thresholds.rule: Crowded extremes => reversal risk; use contrarian logic where appropriate

notes: Implement as a family: e.g., USD, EUR, Gold, Oil, Equities futures.

name: US Yield Curve Slope: 10Y minus 2Y (T10Y2Y)
raw_definition: Key maturities: 10Y and 2Y; inversion historically precedes recessions.

bands_or_thresholds.rule: Spread < 0 (inverted) => recession risk elevated
Spread > 0 and steepening => risk-on tailwind

notes: Primary recession-risk governor for risk budget.

name: US Yield Curve Slope: 10Y minus 3M (often cited as very reliable)
raw_definition: Seminar notes 3M–10Y spread as historically very reliable indicator (alongside 2Y–10Y).

bands_or_thresholds.rule: Spread < 0 => recession risk elevated

notes: Use alongside T10Y2Y; treat as confirmation/contradiction pair.

name: AAII Sentiment Survey (Bull/Bear/Neutral; Bull-Bear spread)
raw_definition: Weekly AAII member survey: 6-month outlook bull/bear/neutral.

bands_or_thresholds.rule: Extreme bearishness (high bear_pct / low bull_bear_spread) => contrarian bullish

notes: Treat extremes as contrarian; verify exact extreme cutoffs during calibration.

name: CBOE Put/Call Ratio (e.g., %21PCRATCBO)
raw_definition: Ratio of traded put option volume to call option volume; higher implies negative sentiment.

bands_or_thresholds.rule: High put/call (fear) => contrarian bullish; low => contrarian caution

notes: Seminar states high implies negative sentiment; define contrarian extremes in playbook.

name: Fear & Greed component: Market momentum
raw_definition: One of seven components listed in seminar (exact definition per CNN methodology).
notes: Component definitions not in text extraction; treat as optional; verify exact series construction.

name: Fear & Greed component: Stock price breadth
raw_definition: One of seven components listed in seminar (exact definition per CNN methodology).
notes: Verify definition and data source.

name: Fear & Greed component: Stock price strength
raw_definition: One of seven components listed in seminar (exact definition per CNN methodology).
notes: Verify definition and data source.

name: CNN Fear & Greed Index (0–100 composite)
raw_definition: Composite of seven equally weighted indicators; 0=extreme fear, 100=extreme greed.

bands_or_thresholds.rule: Very low (fear) => contrarian bullish; very high (greed) => caution

notes: Composite already 0–100; optionally re-map to risk budget with contrarian banding.

name: NAAIM Exposure Index (active manager equity exposure)
raw_definition: Weekly average equity exposure reported by active managers (as of Wed close).

bands_or_thresholds.rule: Very low exposure => contrarian bullish; very high => contrarian caution

notes: Align to weekly cadence using report date (Wed) mapped to week as_of.
